name: My employer has no workers comp insurance, can I sue them in North Salt Lake?
description: Yes, sue for full damages if uninsured.[1]

mainEntity.name: My employer has no workers comp insurance, can I sue them in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue for full damages if uninsured.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, uninsured employers lose exclusive remedy shield and face full personal injury lawsuits.[1] Utah mandates coverage; violators liable in tort.[1] Key factors: Prove lack of insurance; claim intentional if applicable.[1] Practical guidance: Report to Labor Commission, pursue comp fund if available, then sue directly. Higher damages possible including punitives.
